MINISTRY OF CIVIL AVIATION NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 18th November, 2013 S.O. 3446(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (2) of Section 1 of the Rajiv Gandhi National Aviation University Act, 2013 (26 of 2013), the Central Government hereby appoints the 18th day of November, 2013 as the date on which the provisions of the said Act shall come into force. [F. No. AV. 28011/04/2013-ER] M. KANNAN, Economic Advisor -- 1 of 1 --
